problem: Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different?
mechanism: DNA computing for massively parallel search
hypothesis: Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of DNA. DNA computing for massively parallel search directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Hardware prototype with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
